L. 96–165, § 193 Stat. 1267This section is substituted for the source provision for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary and executed language.

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: United Service Organizations, Incorporated (in this chapter, the “corporation”), is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: b .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.
